description: Letter written on behalf of and signed by the Gaʾon Sar Shalom b. Moshe ha-Levi ("Head of the Yeshiva of Ereṣ ha-Ṣevi"). In Hebrew. Dating: Probably 1170–71 or 1173–95 (during Sar Shalom's tenures as Head of the Jews). Addressed to a dignitary named Moshe b. Ḥalfon ha-Kohen ("Chief of the Priests"). Sending greetings and asking that the addressee send him a prayer shawl. The addressee is in the habit of doing this whenever he returns safely from a commercial journey. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב שנכתב בשם הגאון שר שלום ב. משה הלוי. בעברית. תאריך: כנראה 1170-71 או 1173-95. מופנה לנכבד משה ב. חלפון הכהן. שולח ברכות ומבקש שיישלח לו טלית
